section.heading: Obligated service

content.p: A person receiving assistance under this subchapter shall provide service in the full-time clinical practice of the person’s profession as a full-time employee of the Department for the period of obligated service provided in the agreement of such person entered into under section 7603 of this title.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 101–366, title II, § 205(a)(1), Aug. 15, 1990, 104 Stat. 440, § 4354; renumbered § 7654 and amended Pub. L. 102–40, title IV, § 402(b)(1), (d)(1), May 7, 1991, 105 Stat. 238, 239.)

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 1991—Pub. L. 102–40 renumbered section 4354 of this title as this section and substituted “7603” for “4303”.
